name: senior_filtering
description: Tests that senior/lead/manager roles are properly filtered out for fresher profiles

jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer
jobs.description: Senior backend engineer role. Lead a team of 5 engineers building BrowserStack's testing platform. Java, Spring Boot, microservices. 5+ years required.

jobs.title: Staff Software Engineer
jobs.description: Staff engineer for Razorpay's core payments platform. Drive architecture decisions, mentor juniors. 10+ years experience.

jobs.title: Principal Engineer
jobs.description: Principal engineer for Amazon's e-commerce platform. Set technical direction for org of 100+ engineers. 15+ years.

jobs.title: Director of Engineering
jobs.description: Lead Azure's engineering organization. Define strategy, manage VPs, drive product roadmap. 20+ years experience.

jobs.title: Head of Engineering
jobs.description: Head of engineering for CRED. Own the entire engineering organization. Define tech strategy and build the team.

jobs.title: Backend Software Engineer
jobs.description: Join BrowserStack's backend team. Work on Java, Spring Boot, and microservices. 0-2 years experience. Strong mentorship culture.

jobs.title: Software Engineer - New Analyst
jobs.description: New analyst program at Goldman Sachs. Java, Python, Spring Boot. Training provided for recent graduates.
